name: Cita Buana School

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Pejaten Barat Raya No.39, Pasar Minggu, Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Cita Buana stands out for its inclusive approach - families with children who have diverse learning needs often find support here.
paragraphs: Parents say Cita Buana stands out for its inclusive approach - families with children who have diverse learning needs often find support here.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$4.3K – US$15K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities, Learning support centre.
